issue_summary: Simplified DeserializationContext handling a bit by removing StdDeserializationContext, demoting functionaliyt
code_before: public abstract JsonMappingException weirdStringException(Class<?> instClass, String msg);
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Helper method for constructing exception to indicate that input JSON
     * String was not in recognized format for deserializing into given type.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Method that will construct an exception suitable for throwing when
     * some String values are acceptable, but the one encountered is not.
     */
